registration.description: Voter registration in India is the process of getting your name included in the Electoral Roll.
methods: Offline: Booth Level Officer (BLO) via Form 6

timeline.description: ECI announces the schedule and Phase dates
Candidates submit papers to the Returning Officer
Ends 48 hours before the close of poll (Silence Period)
Votes are tallied and results declared

voting.in_person: Primary method using Electronic Voting Machines (EVM)
voting.postal_ballot: Available for 80+ seniors, PwD, and essential service voters
voting.vvpat: Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail slip is visible for 7 seconds
